title: viola riviniana
intro: Viola riviniana, also known as the pale handsel violet or pale violet, is a species of flowering plant in the viola genus, characterized by its pale purple flowers and heart-shaped leaves. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Viola riviniana include its potential to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. In herbal preparations, Viola riviniana is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
